video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library, warm wood interior. Natsu Ashbell, a frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a short guild cloak, stands beside Natsu Starling, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags. They both raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons weaving between their palms, readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous arcane library shot. Natsu Starling adjusts her hand position while Natsu Ashbell maintains her confident stance, the soft mana ribbons stabilize into a steady, glowing arc between both characters, calm teamwork, gentle magical atmosphere, no combat harm, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: Prompts depict non-sexual, cooperative fantasy spell-casting between two characters in a safe, professional guild setting. No violence or inappropriate content included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Synchronizing a spell duet to stabilize the mana flickers in the Arcane Library caused by the recently secured relic.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Shared success in stabilizing arcane energy.
Appreciation for physical support during delicate spellwork.
